entry.title: Re: Document change records

@Connie__ 

 

Please use Archiving Change Documents

The Sales Documents can be archived using SD_VBAK in S/4HANA Cloud 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - CDS - SAC - Authorization Issue
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @aalexis.

Perhaps this community documentation on SAC might help you? Administration | SAP Analytics Cloud | SAP Community, in particular the chapters on user management and authorization across systems.   

There are also several tutorials available to get started with SAP Analytics Cloud like this one. 

If this helped, please mark the response accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Alternative labeling for function location & replacing plant & company code
entry.content:
Hello,

I need help with a business requirement to change the company code and plant. We need to transfer all functional locations and equipment to new plants. All functional locations will have new labels with the same structure indicator.

My concerns:

  1. I plan to activate alternative labeling to change functional location labels. What impact will this have on all master data associated with the functional locations (equipment, maintenance plans, task lists, etc.) and on system operations and reporting?

  2. Is there a solution for mass changing new labels and company codes?

Thanks!

entry.title: How to create/CHANGE RFQ in MM through BAPI or Function module?
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create/change an RFQ in MM. Cany anone guide and advise in this matter.

As, I could not find any such thing for Create/Change an RFQ.

entry.title: Re: Purpose Codes in Payment Media in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Sap-ers

Does anyone have an advice / experience of enabling this payment reason field in SAP Invoice Management (VIM / OpenText) it doesn't appear to be a standard field available in the document header section within table /opt/vim_1head.

Ideally such a value can be added at document header level during invoice processing in VIM before posting and so not have to wait until invoice is posted and then manually updated afterwards before the payment run.  Seems to be a miss if this standard field is not available.  I've tried searching community posts / blogs / help but no joy so far.

Thanks

Steve

entry.title: How can I add the collumn "Amount" in the app Define Distribution Rules - For AuC
entry.content:
Hello,

I got this request where the user wants to insert amounts when defining distribution rules in the app Define Distribution Rules - For AuC instead of percentages.

I found the Table Settings 2.0 and manage the user variants 

Then deselected the Value field and saved 

but nothing happens

Am I doing something wrong or am I missing some authorization? If so what business catalog do I need to perform this change?

Many thanks!

entry.title: How can PA2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.
entry.content:
Hi,

All emplyees' IT2001 for one of absent subtype has been replaced with another absent subtype and that have effected the whole payroll for the month.

How can IT2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.

Please Help out in this matter.

How can we remove this replacement with the original absent subtype when we are not sure for each employee which subtype has been replaced with a specific absent subtype.

It means Replaced Leave Subtype is unknown and with which it is replaced is known.

Now, need to correct that Info Type 2001 for all employees, so that the Payroll can be matched with the Simulation that generated earlier to this change.

How, can I retrieve History of IT2001 and then how can I replace the effected Subtype?

entry.title: Joint Venture Accounting (JVA): Entry XXXX - NB not found in Table T8JJ
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Joint venture accounting is active.

While executing F110 we are getting the below error.

Entry XXXX - NB not found in Table T8JJ

I checked the configuration and found the recovery indicator NB as below.

RI                  Cutback           Billing            Suspense RI             Corp pay
NB                 Untick              Untick            Blank                        Untick

I am new to JVA therefore need suggestions to fix the issue.

 

Thanks, Ganesh

SAP S/4HANA Finance SAP Joint Venture Accounting FIN (Finance)

entry.title: Re: 2024 Early Fall Stammtisch @ Legacy Hall

entry.title: Re: How to add oAttachments2 to oPurchaseQuotations using...
entry.content:
Hi Ankit:

  I just executed this oAttachment2 XML file:


<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16" ?>
<env:Envelope xmlns:env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<env:Header>
<SessionID>5GA1fP7hfApH8vTWL1ukllN/OJOZVoU/dXcUGMxRlL4D1QsUBTq/Q6wdBtqVPsrs</SessionID>
</env:Header>
<env:Body>
<AddObject xmlns="http://127.0.0.1/SAP/">
<BOM>
<BO>
<AdmInfo>
<Object>oAttachments2</Object>
</AdmInfo>
<Attachments2_Lines>
<row>
<SourcePath>\\myURL\aFolder</SourcePath>
<FileName>fileName</FileName>
<FileExtension>pdf</FileExtension>
</row>
<row>
<SourcePath>\\myURL\aFolder</SourcePath>
<FileName>anotherFileName</FileName>
<FileExtension>pdf</FileExtension>
</row>
</Attachments2_Lines>
</BO>
</BOM>
</AddObject>
</env:Body>
</env:Envelope>

These files were uploaded by a different process (only the physical files using a web apllication, ACT1 is not update yet, these files will be part of the attachments for my purchase order), the response from DI server:

 

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<env:Envelope xmlns:env="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
<env:Body>
<env:Fault>
<env:Code>
<env:Value>env:Receiver</env:Value>
<env:Subcode>
<env:Value>-10</env:Value>
</env:Subcode>
</env:Code>
<env:Reason>
<env:Text xml:lang="en">A file with this name already exists. [ATC1.FileName][line: 1] , '\\myURL\aFolder\fileName.pdf'</env:Text>
</env:Reason>
<env:Detail>
<Object>221</Object>
<ObjectIndex>1</ObjectIndex>
<Command>AddObject</Command>
<SessionID>77AD6292-9C3B-41ED-B34F-3A1BC35AC07A</SessionID>
</env:Detail>
</env:Fault>
</env:Body>
</env:Envelope>

 

Then I renamed the files to avoid the previous error and the response from DI Server is:

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<env:Envelope xmlns:env="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
<env:Body>
<env:Fault>
<env:Code>
<env:Value>env:Receiver</env:Value>
<env:Subcode>
<env:Value>-5002</env:Value>
</env:Subcode>
</env:Code>
<env:Reason>
<env:Text xml:lang="en">Source file does not exist , '\\SRVBM49\herramentales\prueba_1623.pdf'</env:Text>
</env:Reason>
<env:Detail>
<Object>221</Object>
<ObjectIndex>1</ObjectIndex>
<Command>AddObject</Command>
<SessionID>F1609CD3-F5A5-485A-B39C-5F98B4532F81</SessionID>
</env:Detail>
</env:Fault>
</env:Body>
</env:Envelope>

I tested your response in another question in the community and it didn't work:

"Select the option Do Not Overwrite Attachments with the Same File Name under Administration → System Initialization → Document Settings → General as per your requirement and test the issue again."

What I'm missing here?

entry.title: Business Partners in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
Master Data is the engine of any integration scenario, which ensures seamlessly integration flow and data consistency. For the CPQ-BRIM integration scenario, Business Partners and Products play this  important role. In this scenario, CPQ is a S/4 HANA public cloud solution, where the Quote 2.0 engine integrates with S/4 HANA Private Cloud Billing and Revenue integration to help customers efficiently configure products for the customers, negotiate right prices and create right quotes to efficiently manage their sales process.

It is important to understand the key related terms viz – Business Partners, Partner functions and Involved Parties here.

  • Business partners of an organization are all the entities that have business relations with that organization.
  • Partner functions determine how a certain business partner is related to a transaction. The most common partner functions are Sold-To Party (entity to which goods are being sold), Ship-To Party (entity to which goods are being shipped), Payer (entity responsible for payment), Bill-To Party (entity to which invoice is issued), and so on.
  • The Involved parties tab in the quote is where users choose partner function and choose or add business partners to create an involved party. An involved party on a quote is a business partner matched with the partner function they perform on the quote. The prerequisite for managing involved parties on the quote is to create the Involved parties tab following this procedure. The tab is empty if there are no partner functions selected to be added by default on the quote.

Example

Lisa Adams is the buyer of the goods sold through a quote. Keshav Madhavan is replicated as a Business Partner from S/4 HANA into SAP CPQ, while the partner function Sold-to party is already in the CPQ system, created by default when the Business Partner feature is enabled. On the quote, the user creates a new involved party by selecting Keshav Madhavan from the list of existing business partners and Sold-to party from the list of partner functions.

 

The Business Partner data transitions from S/4 HANA to SAP Mater Data Integration (MDI) on BTP to SAP Cloud Integration and finally is replicated to SAP CPQ.

 

  1. Leading system for Business Partner creation in this integration is S/4 HANA, where integration is enabled with SAP Cloud Integration via SAP Mater Data Integration (MDI).
  2. SAP CPQ provide api: /api/businesspartner/v1/businesspartner for Business Partner CRUD operations.
  3. By default, tenants with the Business Partner feature use 3-letter country abbreviations.
  4. Type of Partner functions supported in this integration are:
    • Sold-To Party (mandatory) (SAP CPQ -> SetUp -> Workflow/Approval -> Required Fields by Workflow Action -> crossing of Sold-to party(Vertical) and Place Order(Horizontal)
    • Ship-To Party
    • Bill-To Party
    • Payer Party
    • Contact Person
    • Employee Responsible
  5. The SAP BRIM can only deal with one value per Partner Function. Therefore, the SAP CPQ system must not send more than one Business Partner for each Partner Function.
    • SetUp -> Quotes -> Partner Functions
  6. Partner Functions can only be replicated from SAP CPQ to SAP BRIM if the Partner Function Key exists in SAP BRIM and was entered on the More tab in the integration flow configuration.
    • Navigate to CPI Instance
    • Design – Package: SAP CPQ - Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management
    • Click on Artifact Replicate Quote 2.0 from SAP CPQ to SAP S4HANA
    • Click Configure
    • Click More
    • Sample screenshot below                

                 

7. Once the BP is created in S/4 it can be automatically replicated by using DRF or you can replicate it manually by using the DRF tile "Replicate by Object selection. The Business Partner Replication can either be triggered directly from SAP Billing Revenue and Innovation Management to SAP CPQ or via SAP Master Data Integration. Both scenarios can make use of the same iFlow in SAP Cloud Integration as the inbound Business Partner object has the same structure. However, the settings in SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management determine if the Business Partner is replicated directly from SAP S/4HANA to SAP CPQ or from SAP S/4HANA via SAP MDI to SAP CPQ.

8. In SAP CPQ, ID displayed in the field Partner ID on business partner should match the business partner in SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management.         

                   

                      

9. The quote created in CPQ must contain an involved party with this partner function and a business partner. The system then uses the assigned business partner to filter the contracts from SAP S/4HANA and display only the contracts related to that business partner when creating a new asset in the change process scenario.

entry.title: Re: Composites in SAP Analytics Cloud.
entry.content: Is it possible to create a text box that will be able to house Dynamic Text ?

entry.title: How to Understand the HANA Generated CalculationScenario
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have below design 

HANA CVs(Ex: CV1,CV2 ) With Input Parameters >> Used as Sources In HANA BW HCPR (EX:CP1) >> Generate External CV for HCPR CP1

The Generated CV ( "_SYS_BIC"."system-local.bw.bw2hana/CP1" with Input Params ) Internally use some generated object as Source which will be in this pattern :  "<Schema-Name>"."0BW:BIA:CP1"  

When I open that object , It has some script which seems to be called as Calculation Scenario.

Questions:
a) How can we under stand that Calculation Scenario Script , As its not SQL.

b) When I use this Generated CV ("system-local.bw.bw2hana/CP1") of CP1  as Source in any further CV , Will that Input Params gets pushed back to the Base CV's ( CV1,CV2 base nodes ) Via CalculationScenario Script ? 

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Real Talk with Britta & Eduardo | Data & Analytics Track Leads
entry.content:
Hello everybody! I’m Eduardo, a Product Manager in Data & Analytics, with a focus on SAP  Data Intelligence and SAP Datasphere. I was born in Brazil and love travelling the world with my family, meet people, discover new cultures and different types of food.

Hi guys, I’m Britta, a Product Manager for Data & Analytics. I live in “Pfalz”, a nice region in Germany, close to Walldorf, where we enjoy delicious white wine. When I’m not dealing with SAP, I love playing the violin and hang out with my kids.

“Data is at the heart of the new, sustainable enterprise!”

Yes, indeed it is. Data & Analytics gives organizations a competitive advantage, enabling informed decisions and uncovering new opportunities. Especially when you think of how powerful AI has become, opportunities are infinite. However, the best AI models are only as strong as its database. Poor data leads to flawed predictions and underperforming AIs.

Our track provides a set of hot topics and new features along our closely integrated product portfolio to help you to stay in control of your data:

  1. SAP Datasphere serves as SAP’s Business Data Fabric solution: Deliver trusted, context-rich data to every user with business context​ and logic intact​.
  2. Build Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA​: Utilize generative AI, context-awareness,​ and connected to vital business data.
  3. Extended Planning and Analysis​ with SAP Analytics Cloud: Elevate enterprise planning with an optimized, vertically integrated consumption layer for planning and analytics workloads.
  4. Improve your business-critical information with Master Data Governance.

What inspired you to specialize in this track?

With this portfolio we empower organizations to make more informed, efficient, and strategic decisions. We are also very excited to collaborate with so many outstanding SAP experts and customers. This is what inspired us to specialize in this track.

How does this track embody the ‘where ideas get real’ spirit?

In Data & Analytics, we turn abstract concepts and creative thoughts into tangible outcomes in our solutions. In Clean Core for example, SAP HANA’s integration with SAP Build allows you to easily create AI-driven, context-aware applications while keeping workloads separate from your ERP system. In our lecture DA102, Henkel will share how they optimized trade promotions with HANA Cloud ML capabilities.

Track stars (top sessions to keep on your radar):

Kicking your journey off we recommend watching the Track Intro “DA100 – Data in the Age of AI” with Tobias and Britta. We will summarize our complete lecture portfolio, talk about recent deliveries and investment areas for the future and introduce some deep-dive topics.

  1. DA103: Generative AI–driven business transformation enabled by SAP HANA Cloud: Hear from Markus and Christoph how SAP HANA supports AI initiatives.
  2. DA106: Integration of SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere solutions: Listen to Maximilian and see how we bring two solutions more and more together - #BetterTogether!
  3. DA110: How to treat data as a product: Join Suva and Florian to learn about how Data Products together with SAP Datasphere will foster agility.
  4. DA200: Best features of SAP BW in SAP Datasphere: Learn from Dominik and Klaus-Peter about features you know from SAP BW that have made their way natively into SAP Datasphere.

 Please do not forget to register for our two Jumpstart sessions DA180 and DA181.

What should be in everyone’s TechEd toolkit for 2024?

  • Comfortable desk and chair: As TechEd is 100% virtual this year, it is important to feel comfortable - feel free to stay in your pajamas 😉!
  • Be open and curious to explore the sessions we have prepared for you!
  • Agenda Builder - as you will find many interesting sessions, this will help you maximize your time. But don’t worry, if you miss sessions, look for the recording afterwards.

Check out our Session Catalog and register for the lectures of your interest!

See you at Teched &  

Britta & Eduardo

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh,

you also need to add in a suitable IAM App the Authorisation Object "S_NUMBER" and enter the names of your objects in the field NROBJ, and maintain proper activities, depending on the role you intend. Otherwise the intervals are not shown/maintainable in customer tenanants.

KR,
Holm

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content: Hi Holm, thank you! Is it only for the customer tenants ? becuase, the app shows the NR objects just fine in TEST environment without doing any of this.

entry.title: Re: Two-tier ERP and Group Reporting: Deployment Options with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your suggestions.

You are right that GRDC apps and the required services are hosted on SAP Business Cloud Platform (BTP). GRDC integrates with S/4HANA for group reporting – cloud or OP – via APIs.

GRDC is part of SAP's product strategy for consolidation. If customers run SAP S/4HANA for group reporting in combination with SAP S/4HANA private cloud or S4HANA public cloud, the SAP Group Reporting Data Collection (GRDC) is a tool which enables connection of SAP or Non-SAP data from different sources to the Group Reporting in an automated way. It runs on the BTP environment. For more information, users can click here

However, it is technically feasible to upload data extracts from subsidiaries to Headquarters without GRDC in case the customer decides not to leverage GRDC for group reporting purposes.

In summary, diagrams 1 and 2 represent possible Two-tier ERP deployment options for Group Reporting.

Regarding Central Finance part, users can refer to SAP note - 3398470 - Central Finance: Restriction Note for the integration of an SAP S/4HANA Cloud source system to Central Finance

entry.title: Re: Maintenance of Rules for Inbound Email Distribution (SO50) and the Exit code.

entry.title: IDOC to IDOC(OnPremise) scenarios solution approach ?TPM or IFLOW??
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

 

I need your support to find a good solution approach for the IDOC to IDOC scenarios .

We have many IDOC scenarios, where the IDOC from one ERP (On Premise) system is sent to another ERP system(On Premise)

Since these are IDOC transaction it is possible to implement in TPM.

But I would like to know whether this is recommended by SAP .

Whether TPM or Normal IFLOW is the right solution approach for the IDOC to IDOC scenarios when we are moving to BTP -IS?

entry.title: Re: Moving from Solman to C-ALM, what about users with no...
entry.content: So the SAP systems are 100% on prem and will never have access to SAP. How will the data get from the systems to SAP for Earlywatch functions?

entry.title: Re: Moving from Solman to C-ALM, what about users with no external network
entry.content: All SAP systems - including Solman are 100% on prem and will never have external access we are unable to move to any sort of cloud offering either. My concern overall is if Earlywatch delivery and functions move to SAP cloud ALM, do we just lose access to it because our systems will not be able to send data back to SAP? I have to imagine there will be way to allow this functionality since it is contractually obliged.

entry.title: Information message pop up in BDC called in RFC using starting new task called from RAP method issue
entry.content:
I have a BDC which is called from RAP behaviour implementation class method using RFC starting in new task .There is an  custom warning message"(type I) that pops up when BDC runs. When we execute same FM in SAP it skips the information message and continues, but since here we are calling BDC from RFC the system unable to skip the information message hence goes in error. 

When i try to record the BDC again that popup screen not getting captured in recording program eventhough it gets called .

Kinldy help how to skip this warning message.

entry.title: Is there a way to prevent ObjectPageSubSection from promoting to ObjectPageSection?
entry.content:
According to SAPUI5 documentation, if there is only subsection within a section, its title is displayed instead of the section title. I wanted a way to disable that, or at least to workaround it, because my screen needs to be something like the image below, where both the title of the section ("Section 1") and the subsection ("Subsection") are displayed. I managed to do that only because I inserted a second subsection, but I want this behavior to persist even if there is only one subsection.

As reference, this is what happens now when there is only one subsection:

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner Toolset (BDT) at Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi, I'm new to BTD.

I'm trying to create a custom button in the BP transaction to navigate to a new custom screen integrated with BP.
I've followed the above link without success.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/bp-transaction-new-button-on-application-toolbar-with-bdt/td-p/12376672

I've created the new status as a copy of status SCREEN_1000_1 in function group BUPA_DIALOG_JOEL.
I could see my new button, but some of the standard buttons did not appear.

Does someone have a sample of how to do this?

Thanks,

Carlos.

entry.title: AP Draft Invoices - Attachments - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working with a client and setting up an approval process for AP Invoices.

The approver has a limited license and can not open the AP Invoice screen to see the attachments.

Does anyone have a workaround that from the alert and clicking on the line, the user can see the attachments for the AP draft invoice and open the attachments?

Thanks in advance.

SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: Send the PR data to HANA without Budget check
entry.content:
Please check

https://support.ariba.com/item/view/196910

https://support.ariba.com/item/view/176316

3239250 - How does the Application.Budget.CheckBudgetDuringFinalApproval parameter work?

Symptom

How does the Application.Budget.CheckBudgetDuringFinalApproval parameter work?

Resolution

The parameter Application.Budget.CheckBudgetDuringFinalApproval is used to check the budget when the final approver approves the purchase requisition (PR) document. This will only take effect if the final approver is a member of the Budget Approver group. The PR will go through without checking the budget if a normal user approves the requisition.

entry.title: Re: Issue for getting Output Format for a SQVI query
entry.content: I'm not getting that option anyway though, I don't see any option 'Export as', so might be any problem with the Query?

entry.title: Re: Finally! we have an open source LLM trained on SAP APIs and ABAP
entry.content:
@MarioDeFelipe 

We generally don't observe hallucination issues. However With your prompt our AI misunderstood the request (but produced valid SQL).

When I changed the prompt to:

Can I update 2 columns from 2 tables joined by foreign key with one statement in SAP HANA? Those 2 to be changed columns are each in separate tables

It answered correctly.

entry.title: Re: BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM was not triggering.
entry.content:
Hi,

Today I faced the same problem. I implemented the BADI but SAP was not triggering it. I created a trace using Custom Logic Trace, but the BADI was not there.

Somehow, the solution was to Edit the code in the Badi (without changing anything) and Activate it again.

entry.title: Re: IDOC to IDOC(OnPremise) scenarios solution approach ?TPM or IFLOW??
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content: yes, seems so. We had exactly the same issue, and after a rather lengthy OSS conversation the above solution was advised.

entry.title: Assembly Processing (PS)
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

I'm working with the assembly processing scenario, using quotation and network. I have two "materials," both linked to the same standard network. The standard network, in turn, is associated with a standard project that contains only one WBS element.

The process works perfectly for both materials (Screenshot_00.jpg and Screenshot_01.jpg), but only when the sales document (which is the quotation) has a single item.

 

 When I add a second item (Screenshot_02.jpg), an error occurs (Screenshot_03.jpg).

 

It seems like the WBS element to be created is validated in the sales document before it's actually generated, or the WBS element is simply not created at all.

I'm using version 2024. I believe this might be a program error, as I've already encountered another issue where I had to apply SAP note 3408903 because the system wasn't even creating the operative network.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or can offer any help? @SAPSupport 

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Information message pop up in BDC called in RFC using starting new task called from RAP method i
entry.content: Weird. Messages in batch input should behave consistently whatever the context. Check the SAP Notes / Contact SAP Support. https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenabap_message_batch_input.htm

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: where's the solution section

entry.title: Re: How to create/CHANGE RFQ in MM through BAPI or Functi...
entry.content:
Hello @RumzaanSultan 

As per note 2115337 - BAPI or MASS Options for RFQs - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA there is no standard BAPI for requests for quotation. You'd need to use a batch input to ME41.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: SAP Lighthouse Program - Partner Use Cases adopting BTP GenAI Capabilities [Part 2]
entry.content:
The SAP office of the CTO sponsors the SAP BTP Lighthouse Program, which provides advanced access and hands-on support for BTP services with GenAI capabilities to partners and customers. Partners are crucial to SAP's goal to help the world run better and improve people’s lives, and the Lighthouse program's partner track helps them deliver GenAI use cases using SAP resources.

In part 2 of this 3-part series, I will highlight some of the amazing work that participating partners have created leveraging SAP Business AI services such as:

SAP Build Code: SAP’s Generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development.

Our partner, PwC leverages SAP Build Code to build a Speech-Enabled Auto-Commenting Assistant that helps companies access useful information from unstructured documents for multiple customers.

Wipro uses SAP Build Code to build a Smart Energy Procurement Advisor Tool for power (electric) procurement planners of Energy and Utility companies to have a clear plan for managing energy consumption demands by recommending optimally priced energy source mix and minimal disruption.

Check out part one of the series for partners that have adopted SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine and SAP Generative AI Hub. You can find out more about these partners and SAP BTP GenAI services here. Looking for even more adoption stories - there is exciting news coming up from the Lighthouse program partners and our product teams at SAP TechEd, Oct 8-9 2024, Register Today!

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to prevent ObjectPageSubSection from p...
entry.content: did you check the documentation? showTitle attribute.

I'm intrested to Particpate in the Digtial certification programme for SAP sales and Distribution module, please consider me for further steps and guide me.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to prevent ObjectPageSubSection from p...
entry.content:
Hi junwu, thanks for the answer.

Yes, I thought of the showTitle property too, but the note is discouraging: "Note: If a subsection is the only one (or the only one visible) within a section, its title is displayed instead of the section title even if this property is set to false". Anyway, I tested my application with lots of combinations for section's and subsection's showTitle, but nothing worked.

entry.title: Output Management for S4HANA missing determination in application log
entry.content:
Hello experts, i'm relatively new to Output Management in S4, I have been using previously NACE. I'm trying to get the determination log in SLG1 as explained here : https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/output-management-s4hana-trace-maxime-d%C3%A9r%C3%A9/

 

It partially works but i'm not getting any of the informational logs, only warnings 😞

This is what I get : 

But none of the determination log such as this 

Thanks in advance for any help!

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content: Hello, I'm preparing for the same certificate. You can definitely find mock exams online. Just Google the title with "mock exam"

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Highlight: Composite
entry.content: Is it possible to have a text box where you can add Dynamic Text in the composite widget ?

entry.title: Standard iflow for SF-S4 Employee availability replication
entry.content:
I have the package "SAP SuccessFactors - Employee Availability Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud " implemented in production. I think SAP recommend to schedule this daily and it generally runs only once a day technically even if we schedule hourly.  How can we get it run near Realtime to get the Delta's run immediately? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Standard iflow for SF-S4 Employee availability replic...
entry.content:
This availability service has limitation that it can not replicate delta in real time. the iflow only replicates data once day, however, it can triggered on ADHOC basis to replicate the data any time by setting the parameter "Test" mode to "True".

Generally, availability data does not change every hour and that is why delta is not required more than once a day.

entry.title: BODS SAP DS file_move XML file processing
entry.content:
I have a an XML BODS processing job, processing many XML files at a time. 

Now I have a requirement, on an Linux server, using BODS function file_move, but it needs to only move one XML file to a different folder at a time, not all XML files. 

The reason is that some XML files might be badly formatted, and can't be processed by the BODS job, and those XML files need to go to a different folder after processing. 

 

Anyone had such a scenario before? Thanks!

entry.title: S/4HANA for product Compliance NEW Dangerous Goods Management - unable to trigger classification
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I am trying to set up the Product Compliance on S/4HANA, and go through the end-to-end process of completing the assessment - specifically for Dangerous Goods Management solution on S4HANA 2023.

Unfortunately, I am unable to trigger the assessment - I am expecting the item to appear in my worklist in the "my unpackaged dangerous goods" app, after assigning the compliance purpose to the CCI. I am following the best practice steps in accordance to 3FC in-scope item, and have performed the following: 

  1. created semi-finished material - set to compliance relevant
  2. created finished material - set to compliance relevant
  3. created compliance purpose, and assigned a Compliance Requirement available from the embedded content (IMDG-CODE)
  4. created unpackaged product. assigned the compliance purpose, related materials, related packaged products, created substances/compositions

According to the 3FC test script, the next step is to classify the product. However, the unpackaged product does not appear in the "my unpackaged dangerous goods" app. I am unsure if this is a bug or missing configuration or missing data at this point. 

To note, this issue also occurs in the other solution areas such as Product Marketability. 

Please refer to the attached screenshots where you can see that the compliance purpose has been assigned, yet it does not show in the worklist.

entry.title: I create sales order and I do delivery when I press post goods issue this message sent to me
HCM Time Transfer Creation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently creating a new time transfer and time types to capture the beginning and end balances for the grouping of absences.

My question:

In PT40, after running PT40 and doing multiple selection for cumulative balance I get the below result. However, the Beg Balance disappears randomly in different periods for multiple PERNR:

First Example of Z262 Disappearing Randomly:

PERNR, Period, Time-Type, Time Type Description, Number

00112 202309 Z261 XYZ Benefit Correction 480.00
00112 202309 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 0.00
00112 202309 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202310 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 480.00
00112 202310 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202311 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 480.00
00112 202311 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202312 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 480.00
00112 202401 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202402 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202403 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202404 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202405 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
 
 
Second Example of Beg Balance Z262 disappearing:
PERNR, Period, Time-Type, Time Type Description, Number
11111 202108 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 0.00
11111 202108 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 80.00-
11111 202109 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 80.00-
11111 202109 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 168.00-
11111 202110 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 168.00-
11111 202110 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202111 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202111 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202112 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202112 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202201 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202201 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202202 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202202 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202203 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202203 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202204 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202204 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202205 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202205 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202206 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202206 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202207 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202207 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202208 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202208 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202209 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202209 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202210 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202210 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202211 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202212 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202301 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202302 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202303 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202304 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202305 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202306 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202307 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-

Does anyone know why Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance disappeared?

Thank you for your help HCM Experts!

BL

Nevertheless, thanks a lot for the time taken to help me with this.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I believe this initiative is a great fit for me as I’m passionate about enhancing my skills in the digital domain, particularly in areas like in project management , development and supply chain. 

i am a women,

slavia

entry.title: Re: Information message pop up in BDC called in RFC using starting new task called from RAP method i
entry.content: Check what's triggering the message box. Put a break point on the line before the message.

entry.title: Re: Sort and filter not working extended standard fiori app
entry.content: Did you extend the OData using SEGW transaction?  If so, then you should check the properties and see if sort and filter checkbox is checked for the new field.

entry.title: Re: Execute BEx queries at the same time
entry.content: for Ztest query, can youadd more fields in row/columns and/or an input variable or to make it slow so that you get time to debug and check in sm50 . Also Did you try replication after disabling the cache option.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Integration Suite artifact deployment issue using CI/CD pipeline
entry.content:
Hi Ankush,

I am doing the same exact scenario as yours and getting the below error at Upload stage : hudson.AbortException: [integrationArtifactUpload] Step execution failed (category: undefined). Error: HTTP POST request to https://<trialcpiaccount>/api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts failed with error: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"><code>Bad Request</code><message xml:lang="en">Integration flow project must contain a manifest file.</message></error>

However the file and iflow is there in Github, any idea how to resolve this?

Regards,

Shiveta

entry.title: Re: How to consume the open OData service in SAP CPI?
entry.content: @preethi_ande  Pls try with OData V4 adapter in cloud integration, also use this URL. https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/  . V2 adapter throws error.

entry.title: Re: La cantidad no puede exceder la cantidad en el documento base
entry.content: Buenas tardes, se está presentando este mensaje en facturas de venta y de compra, ya se revisaron notas y no tienen nada de autorizaciones, aplicamos parametrizaciones de documento "Si la cantidad o el importe exceden la cantidad o el importe planificados para los documentos" dejando todo en sin mensaje pero persiste el error, no se encuentra documetación, alguien le ha pasado lo mismo?

entry.title: Re: La cantidad no puede exceder la cantidad en el documento base
entry.content: esto me ocurre en versiones 10 FP2011 y FP2208

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content: Hi Holm, thanks again. Do need to maintain any information in Overview and Services tabs? or just update these in the authorization tab is good enough?

entry.title: Re: Sort and filter not working extended standard fiori app
entry.content: those check box are information only, it is not going to do sorting/filtering for you.

entry.title: Re: manage customer line items fiori app : newly added custom fields Sort/Filter not working
entry.content: Check if the new fields are sortable and filterable in property.

entry.title: Re: SAP extends ERP cloud portfolio with "SAP ERP, private edition, option for Microsoft SQL&qu
entry.content:
@ChristophZimmermann 

Thanks for the clarification / confirmation. 

It is what I thought.  ECC 6 on Azure with MSSQL on Windows... No Linux.

No change to the end dates.  So if you are EhP 0-5, this is a really tight timeline to move and then upgrade.

With customer specific maintenance.  Will that be allowed in PCE?  I would assume not.

Sorry for adding confusion with the RISE brand.  My understanding is there are other components available with this option.  (Stand Alone Access controls for example). 

I assume I can add in BOBJ and Data Services and IAAS as needed.

BW on SQL Server?  

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sorting not working on object Page Item table SAP CAP BTP Fiori elements
entry.content: Hello, I have a similar problem, but in dev mode in VSCode or BAS, the filters are working properly. When I deploy to environment in BTP, it fails as simillar manner as you describe your issue...

entry.title: SAC Calculate after aggregation based on datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

   I am trying to calculate the difference of GP% between current year and last year. But the formula behave kind of weird. Here is our sample data:

We have calculated the GP% for 2024/08 and 2024/07 in the Analytic Model of Datasphere and it worked just fine(Green). But when it come to SAC story to calculate difference of 2 years, instead of simply minus one from the other, it seem to firstly calculate the difference of each SALES/COST/GP(Orange) and then calculate GP/SALES(Red) which is wrong. What we need is the calculation after aggregation which is just simply 0.42 - 0.37. 

Any suggestion?

We are using live connection from SAC to Datasphere, I've tried to create calculated measures both in the view and analytic model but neither of them worked.

entry.title: "Operations in SAP HANA/BWA" in tab "Runtime Properties" of BW query
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

    we have a SAP AO report, running on sap bw query (source from SAP HANA view). when set [0]No optimized operations in SAP HANA/no BWA for "Operations in SAP HANA/BWA" in tab "Runtime Properties" of the BW query. the data is correct.

    However, when set operation to other values, the report result is wrong.

    My question: why report result is not consistent by setting different operation values ?

entry.title: Develop BOM query report using API
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

    We use API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002 to develop BOM query report. We find that we must input "BillOfMaterial" (bomid) .But where will we know the ID when querying? We hope to query by material number.We also couldn't find an API to query bomid by material number.

B.R

John Huang

entry.title: Re: "Operations in SAP HANA/BWA" in tab "Runtime Properti...
entry.content:
Query can be optimized by deleting the fields not needed in the SQL-statement.
Your source did not return the same results with and without these fields, so check the aggregation behavior first.
Maybe the "Keep" flag in HANA can help to bring all necessary fields into the final result.

entry.title: Re: Intermediate Level Understanding of SAP BTP Architecture
entry.content: @grafs Totally agree, and it is decided by various factors, e.g. what is the application used for, who is the end users, what is the IT skills, how complicated is the backend logic... If ABAP can handle everything and is suitable for that, definitely ABAP is the right way. However, BTP is more and more open which means it is fast reactive to any new technical trends e.g. AI, while ABAP natively is hard to follow in my opinion.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Dear David

I hope this email finds you well.

My Name is Ha from Viet Nam . I am pleased to inform you that I have just transitioned from hardware support position to SAP Consultant Junior at my company as I'm interested in SAP field and this is also a chance for me to expand my knowledge  in company business processes.

This is a good start to learn SAP journey and take an SAP Certified

Thank you for your assistance.

Ha

entry.title: BW/4HANA Cockpit - process-chain-monitor no longer shows the current runs after login
entry.content:
Hello BW-Experts,

the process chain monitoring in the BW4 cockpit no longer shows the current runs after login.
We have to refresh this view manually every time.
I have discovered that the job ODQ_TQ_JOB should actually be running in the background to periodically
start tasks such as RSPC_RECENT_RUN_CACHE.
This job is no longer running in our system (maybe someone deleted it) and I can't schedule it because it is
supposedly started via the "ODP-framework".

How can I fix/schedule this missing job or repair the non-refreshing monitoring ?

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Questions on usage of "SAP Crystal Reports" in InTouch HMI application
entry.content:
We are analysing "SAP Crystal Reports" for our existing reporting requirements.

Currentlly we use Crystal Reports 8.5 that can be embedded as ActiveX control within the InTouch HMI application to generate and export the requested report at run-time to PDF, in multiple languages, including Chinese.

However as a number of Crystal Reports SDKs have been retired by Crystal Reports 2008 (12.x) and as OCX is not supported now, the newer versions of the product no longer provide a control that can be embedded or included in the InTouch HMI application.

Kindly answer our couple of questions:

1. Can latest "SAP Crystal Reports" be embedded in same was as Crystal Reports 8.5 within the InTouch HMI application and generate and export report at run-time to PDF?

2. Can "SAP Crystal Reports" file be opened and exported to PDF from .NET code?

Thanks in advance for your answers.

entry.title: Re: CAP: Handling of Media Data with Malware Scanning
entry.content:
Hi Ajit, 

Thanks for the blog. The scanner part is working fine and I'm getting the output as well, i.e. 

"malwareDetected": false

But when I'm trying to update the content in the backend its throwing some error. Any idea on this?

 

 

Thanks & regards,

Adarsh

entry.title: SAP malware scanning service in CAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We've a requirement where we need to integrate SAP Malware Scanning service with our CAP/UI5 application. If you have any insights or suggestions, we would greatly appreciate your assistance. 

Thank you for your attention to this issue. We look forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

Adarsh

entry.title: Re: Issue with concatenate. No blanks at the end. RESPECTING BLANKS not working fully.
entry.content:
I did a test. I confirm that it works as I said (in fact, what says the SAP documentation):

For TRANSFER, you have to use a variable of type STRING or the word LENGTH if you use a variable of type C. TRANSFER - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com):

If the file was opened as a text file or a legacy text file, the trailing blank characters are deleted for all data objects, except for those of data type string.

When I said that "probably you have used a way to download the file, which removes the [trailing blanks]", I meant that after the use of TRANSFER, you have retrieved the file in such a way that you didn't keep the trailing blanks. Anyway, you did something wrong, but you didn't provide enough information to clarify what exactly was wrong.

entry.title: Re: Inbound delivery without putaway in sap public cloud
entry.content: Added supply chain tag. Please remove SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition tag.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HC Professional Services - 2nd Approval Level for Timesheet Entries?
entry.content: Added Professional Services tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Custom field logic
entry.content: Added procure tab, please remove SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion is not functioning incorrect setup issue with public cloud
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion is not functioning incorrect setup issue with public cloud
entry.content: Hello, could please first share how did you make the posting? With which app?

entry.title: Re: How is the "Missing Hours" is being calculated in "Manage My Timehseet" appl
entry.content: Added HR tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Alternative labeling for function location & replacin...
entry.content:
IMHO teh aspects of mass changing Company code and Plant are completely unrelated to the question relating to alternative labelling (AL) for functional locations (FL).

Please check corresponding doc and notes for AL.
When activating it newly created FLs will have an internal ID (TPLNR '?nnnnnn...nnn') and the label will be stored in a filed STRNO. For existing FLs the TPLNR will not change from the 'readable' representation - but corresponding label might change over time.
Thus no impact on other areas referencing the FLs.
For mass change options please check mass change funcitonalities in the list reports for FLs.

For mass changing FL labels you will most probably have to call some FL API (BAPI, Odata service) in order to determine the new label individually.

entry.title: Re: Adding a tab in manage cost center app using UI Adaptation
entry.content: Added Extensibility tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Customize printout format
entry.content: Added SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe tag.

entry.title: Re: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request' trigger the 'Credit Memo Request' Workflow?
entry.content: Added procure tag, Please remove other tags.
